merlin.name: Merlin
merlin.description: Knows all servants of evil (except Mordred). Must guide the forces of Good without revealing his identity.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: Attempts to identify and assassinate Merlin if the forces of Good win 3 missions.

servant.name: Loyal Servant of Arthur
servant.description: A loyal servant of Arthur. Has no special powers.

minion.name: Minion of Mordred
minion.description: A servant of evil. Knows the other servants of evil.

percival.name: Percival
percival.description: Sees who may be Merlin (and Morgana). Helps protect Merlin.

morgana.name: Morgana
morgana.description: Appears as a "possible Merlin" to Percival.

mordred.name: Mordred
mordred.description: Hidden from Merlin's sight. Exceedingly powerful.

oberon.name: Oberon
oberon.description: Does not know the other servants of Evil, and they do not know him.

lancelot_good.name: Good Lancelot
lancelot_good.description: Begins loyal to Good. If his loyalty is switched, he fights for Evil.

lancelot_evil.name: Evil Lancelot
lancelot_evil.description: Begins loyal to Evil. Does not open his eyes with the other Minions (raises his thumb). If his loyalty is switched, he fights for Good.

narration.3: Servants of Evil, raise your thumbs
narration.4: Servants of Evil, open your eyes and behold your companions
narration.5: Servants of Evil, close your eyes
narration.6: Merlin, open your eyes and behold the servants of evil
narration.7: Servants of Evil, lower your thumbs. Merlin, close your eyes
narration.9: Percival, open your eyes and behold Merlin
narration.10: Percival, close your eyes. Everyone, lower your hands
narration.11: Lancelots, open your eyes and know one another
narration.14: Let the quests of Avalon begin! Good luck, knights and servants
narration.3-lancelot: Servants of Evil, raise your thumbs
narration.4-oberon: Servants of Evil, except Oberon, open your eyes...
narration.4-lancelot: Servants of Evil, open your eyes and behold your companions
narration.4-oberon-lancelot: Servants of Evil, except Oberon, open your eyes...
narration.5-mordred: Servants of Evil, close your eyes. Mordred, lower your thumb
narration.5-lancelot: Servants of Evil, close your eyes
narration.5-mordred-lancelot: Servants of Evil, close your eyes. Mordred, lower your thumb
narration.8-morgana: Merlin and Morgana, raise your thumbs
narration.9-morgana: Percival, open your eyes and behold Merlin and Morgana

app.subtitle: Resistance & Betrayal
app.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave the room?
app.fillNameAndCode: Fill in your name and room code

lobby.setOrderHint: Set the seating order and who starts as leader
lobby.ladyOfLakeDesc: Allows investigating the loyalty of other players.
lobby.excaliburDesc: Allows forcing the swap of a mission card.
lobby.targetMissionDesc: Allows choosing the order of missions.
lobby.waitingPlayers: Waiting for more players (minimum 5) to configure the match...
lobby.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to start the match...

character.memorize: Memorize your character and don't show anyone!

narrationView.followAudioHost: Close your eyes and follow the Host's audio instructions.

game.loyaltySwapDesc: The Lancelots switched sides this round.
game.waitingTeam: Wait while the team is being formed.
game.excaliburHint: The leader must give Excalibur to another team member (or any player depending on your interpretation, but generally to a team member or another player).
game.teamOnMission: The team is on a mission...
game.excaliburYouHave: You have Excalibur! You may force a team member to swap their card.
game.excaliburOtherDeciding: {{name}} is deciding whether to use Excalibur.
game.excaliburChoosePlayer: Choose a team member to swap their card:
game.excaliburRevealVote: The vote of {{name}} was revealed as:
game.excaliburVoteInverted: (The vote was flipped for the final result)
game.ladyYouAre: You are the Lady of the Lake! Choose a player to investigate their loyalty.
game.waitingLady: Waiting for the Lady of the Lake...
game.evilMeetingDesc: Discuss who might be Merlin! The Assassin has the final word and must strike.
game.goodWarningDesc: Stay silent! Do not reveal your characters. Evil is trying to find out who Merlin is.
game.goodWon3: Good won 3 missions! The Assassin must try to kill Merlin.

lancelot.noVariantHint: Select at least one variant to see preparation information and rules.

var1.title: 🌀 HIDDEN SWAPS (Var 1)
var1.prep1: Evil Lancelot shows thumb (does not open eyes)
var1.prep2: Lancelots do NOT recognize each other
var1.during0: From round 3, reveal 1 card per turn

var2.title: 📅 PREDETERMINED SWAPS (Var 2)
var2.prep0: Loyalty Deck: 5 blanks + 2 swaps (5 revealed BEFORE)
var2.prep1: Evil Lancelot shows thumb (does not open eyes)
var2.prep2: Lancelots do NOT recognize each other
var2.warn0: Prepare 5 VISIBLE cards before starting the game

var1_var2.title: 🎲 CONTROLLED CHAOS (Var 1 + Mandatory)
var1_var2.prep1: Evil Lancelot shows thumb (does not open eyes)
var1_var2.prep2: Lancelots do NOT recognize each other
var1_var2.during0: At the start of EACH round (1st to 5th), reveal 1 card

var1_var3.title: ✨ CONSCIOUS CHAOS (Var 1 + Var 3)
var1_var3.prep1: Evil Lancelot shows thumb (does not open eyes)
var1_var3.during0: From round 3, reveal 1 card per turn
var1_var3.during2: Only the 2 Lancelots know the real state

var2_var3.title: 📊 PREDICTABLE SWAP (Var 2 + Var 3)
var2_var3.prep0: Loyalty Deck: 5 blanks + 2 swaps (5 revealed BEFORE)
var2_var3.prep1: Evil Lancelot shows thumb (does not open eyes)
var2_var3.warn0: Prepare 5 VISIBLE cards before starting the game

settings.title: Settings
settings.pauseHint: Time the app waits between each narration instruction
settings.keepScreenHint: Prevents the screen from turning off during narration and gameplay
settings.confirmLeaveHint: Ask for confirmation before leaving the room or ending the game
settings.developedFor: Developed for digital use of the game
settings.restoreConfirm: Restore all settings to default values?

guide.title: Game Guide
guide.lancelots_desc: Adds the Lancelot knights (Good and Evil).
guide.excalibur_desc: Allows forcing the swap of a mission card.
guide.targeting_desc: Allows choosing the order of missions.
guide.ladyoflake_desc: Allows investigating the loyalty of other players.
guide.good_condition2_sub: The Assassin fails to kill him
guide.evil_condition2_sub: Create enough confusion so no one trusts anyone
guide.evil_condition3_sub: Identify who knows about evil and kill Merlin
guide.step_setup_a1: Shuffle the character cards according to the number of players
guide.step_setup_a2: Distribute the cards secretly to each player
guide.step_setup_a3: Each player looks at their card without revealing it to others
guide.revelation_default: Evil recognizes each other and Merlin recognizes evil.
guide.revelation_switches_no_recognition: Evil recognizes each other (Evil Lancelot raises thumb, does not open eyes). Merlin recognizes evil. Lancelots do NOT recognize each other.
guide.revelation_no_switches_recognition: Evil recognizes each other and Merlin recognizes evil. At the end (8+ players), both Lancelots open their eyes and recognize each other.
guide.revelation_switches_recognition: Evil recognizes each other (Evil Lancelot raises thumb, does not open eyes). Merlin recognizes evil. At the end (8+ players), both Lancelots recognize each other.
guide.step_lancelot_a1: From round 3 onward, flip 1 card from the Loyalty deck each round
guide.step_lancelot_a1_sub1: If it is a blank card (No Change): Nothing happens, game continues
guide.step_lancelot_a1_sub2: If it is a Switch Allegiance card: Both Lancelots SWITCH SIDES secretly!
guide.step_lancelot_note: The switch affects everything: victory conditions, mission cards and strategy
guide.step_leader_note: The first leader is decided randomly at the start of the game
guide.step_targeting_a1: The leader can choose WHICH mission the team will attempt (in any order)
guide.step_targeting_a2: The 5th mission can only be attempted after 2 successful missions
guide.step_targeting_a3: An attempted mission cannot be attempted again
guide.step_targeting_note: The mission choice can influence whether the proposed team is approved.
guide.step_team_a1: The leader proposes a team for the mission and everyone discusses the proposal
guide.step_team_a2: Each player votes secretly (Approve/Reject) and all reveal votes simultaneously
guide.step_team_a2_sub1: If majority approves → The team goes on the mission
guide.step_team_a2_sub2: If tied or majority rejects → leadership passes to the next player (clockwise)
guide.step_excalibur_a1: The leader gives Excalibur to a team member (cannot keep it themselves)
guide.step_excalibur_a2: Each team player places their card face down in front of them
guide.step_excalibur_a3: BEFORE collecting cards, the Excalibur holder can force ONE player to swap their card
guide.step_excalibur_a4: The holder looks at the player's original card (to know what the initial choice was)
guide.step_excalibur_a5: The leader then collects and shuffles the cards normally
guide.step_excalibur_note: Can be used by Good or Evil to strategically alter the outcome!
guide.step_mission_a1: Each team member receives Mission cards (Success/Fail) and secretly chooses one to play
guide.step_mission_a2: Each team member plays their chosen card face down
guide.step_mission_a3: The leader shuffles and reveals the played cards
guide.step_mission_a3_sub1: If ALL cards are Success → Mission succeeds
guide.step_mission_a3_sub2: If there is ONE or more Fail cards → Mission fails
guide.step_mission_a4: Mark the mission result on the board (GOOD or EVIL victory)
guide.step_mission_note:
GOOD can only play Success cards. EVIL can play Success or Fail.
4th mission with 7+ players needs 2 Fails to fail
guide.step_lady_a1: The Lady of the Lake token starts with the player immediately to the left (clockwise) of the first leader.
guide.step_lady_a2: After the 2nd, 3rd and 4th missions, the token holder chooses another player to examine
guide.step_lady_a3: The examined player receives the 2 Loyalty Cards and secretly passes the card matching their loyalty
guide.step_lady_a4: The holder sees the loyalty (Good or Evil) and may discuss what they saw
guide.step_lady_a5: The examined player receives the Lady of the Lake token
guide.step_lady_note:
Passing the wrong card results in automatic loss. Bluffing is not allowed!
A player who has already used the Lady of the Lake cannot be examined
guide.step_next_a1: Pass leadership to the next player (clockwise)
guide.step_next_a2: Continue until one side wins (3 successes or 3 failures)
guide.step_assassination_a1: If Good wins 3 mission successes, the game does NOT end immediately
guide.step_assassination_a2: Evil players discuss among themselves (without revealing cards)
guide.step_assassination_a3: The Assassin points to a GOOD player
guide.step_assassination_a3_sub1: If it is Merlin: EVIL WINS!
guide.step_assassination_a3_sub2: If it is NOT Merlin: GOOD WINS!
guide.step_assassination_note: This is Evil's last chance! Merlin must be subtle for GOOD to win the game.

manual.title: AVALON
manual.subtitle: The Resistance
manual.footer_credit: The Resistance: AVALON • Original design: Don Eskridge
manual.footer_adapted: This manual was adapted to English for use with the game Assistant
manual.prep_player_dist_sub: Use the table below to determine how many players will be on each team:
manual.prep_4th_warning: In games with 7+ players, the 4th mission requires 2 Fail cards to fail.
manual.prep_revelation_title: Initial Revelation: Evil Recognizes Each Other
manual.prep_revelation_sub: After all players have seen their secret cards, the Leader must conduct the following sequence:
manual.prep_revelation_note: Note: In the app, narration is done automatically by audio. This script is for reference only.
manual.end_summary_r2_good: Assassin misses when trying to kill Merlin

errors.LANCELOT_GOOD_MUST_SUCCEED: Good Lancelot must play Success in this variant.
errors.LANCELOT_EVIL_MUST_FAIL: Evil Lancelot must play Fail in this variant.
errors.GOOD_MUST_SUCCEED: Loyal Servants of Arthur must play Success.
